## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] Ran in Dev Container or Docker Compose environment
- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make compose-config`
- [ ] Frontend checks, if `frontend/package.json` exists: `cd frontend && npm test && npm run build`
- [ ] Documented skipped checks and residual risk

## Notes

- API changes include contract tests or documentation updates.
- Required environment variable changes are reflected in `.env.example`.
